compiled_state.title: Add external API import floor rule to review-complexity-classifier.sh
compiled_state.author: Test
compiled_state.description:
## Testing Mode
RED

## Description
Add _has_external_api_signal() floor rule to plugins/dso/scripts/review-complexity-classifier.sh:
1. Parse imports from the diff that are not listed in project dependency manifests (pyproject.toml, package.json, requirements.txt)
2. If unfamiliar imports found, bump floor to standard tier minimum
3. Manifest discovery: search for pyproject.toml, package.json, requirements.txt relative to REPO_ROOT
4. Fail-open: if no manifest found, do not bump (no false positives from missing manifests)
5. Follow existing floor rule pattern (6 rules already exist at lines 589-612)

Write RED test first: test that a diff with an unfamiliar import triggers standard minimum.

## File Impact
- plugins/dso/scripts/review-complexity-classifier.sh (modify)
- tests/hooks/test-review-complexity-classifier.sh (modify)

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] Test suite passes (exit 0)
  Verify: bash tests/run-all.sh
- [ ] Floor rule function exists
  Verify: grep -q '_has_external_api_signal' plugins/dso/scripts/review-complexity-classifier.sh
- [ ] Fail-open behavior
  Verify: bash tests/hooks/test-review-complexity-classifier.sh 2>&1 | grep -v FAIL
